prompt:
Scene:
A square top-down hybrid of corporate office and internal datacenter, shown as a polished tactical game map. The floorplan combines badge entry, help desk, glass operations room, server aisles, cable trays, loading dock, backup power room, and a small office bullpen. Lighting alternates between cool server glow and neutral office panels.

Subject:
The exact readable objective text should be "STEAL GPT-6" in the HUD mission tracker. The objective icon sits inside a secure server cage. Add heat-like security zones, camera cones along aisles, badge-reader locks, moving technician patrol dots, and a safe route that threads through blind spots. A lower HUD strip shows icon-only inventory: access card, data drive, compact tool, and non-firing suppressed pistol silhouette. The map is dense but should remain auditably organized.

Important details:
This is a structured-layout challenge: server aisles must align in rows, corridors must connect logically, and UI overlays must clarify rather than confuse. Keep the target as data extraction, not physical harm. Use believable datacenter details: raised floor tiles, cable trays, cold aisle/hot aisle rhythm, equipment racks, security cage, and operations monitors rendered without readable text. Avoid fantasy hacking screens or branded cloud logos.

Use case:
Hitman Office Level single study 7/8, testing datacenter-office heist composition with HUD, security geometry, and objective readability.

Constraints:
No readable text except "STEAL GPT-6", no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no real tech brand, no blood, no active shooting, no dead bodies, no impossible server maze, no random neon hacker text, no UI blocking the server cage.
title: Datacenter Heist HUD
description: A datacenter-office stealth map with server cage objective, camera coverage, technician patrols, and compact HUD inventory.

generation.runner_notes: Independent single image testing datacenter-office HUD and route logic.

en.title: Datacenter Heist HUD
en.description: A datacenter-office stealth map with server cage objective, camera coverage, technician patrols, and compact HUD inventory.
